title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (27), PAGE 135, SUB-PARAGRAPH 38, FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, PARAGRAPH "A", TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-ONE HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1221 / 65 OG No. 10, 2319 (March 10, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5079, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (27), PAGE 135, SUB-PARAGRAPH 38, FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, PARAGRAPH "A", TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-ONE HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative's of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (27), page 135, subparagraph 38, for Mountain Province, paragraph

"a", Title B, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Thirty-one hundred one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(27) Taloctoc Mananga Trailâ¦â¦â¦â¦â¦..P8,000"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
